tasks.build: deno task build:rust && deno task build:wasm
tasks.build:wasm: deno task build:wasm:raw && deno task build:wasm:merge && deno task build:wasm:strip-impl && deno task build:wasm:opt
tasks.build:wasm:raw: RUSTFLAGS="--remap-path-prefix $HOME=~" cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --profile release-wasm && cp target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release-wasm/pxtone.wasm target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release-wasm/pxtone_raw.wasm
tasks.test: deno task test:rust && deno task test:wasm
tasks.test:wasm: deno task build:wasm && deno test --allow-read tests/wasm_test.ts
